SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFFS BARBARA SUE LEE AND WILLIAM HWONG ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANTS DENISE BOOKER AND KEVIN MOORE ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIFFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE, BARBARA SUE HWONG, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOOKER, DENISE $6,480.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,655.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
